chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI Income Tax Reference Applications 675 & 676 of 2010 ____________________________________________________________ DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE ____________________________________________________________ Hearing of case. 1. For order on CMA No.745/2010 2. For hearing of main case. 27.02.2023 None present on behalf of the applicant nor any intimation received. On the last date of hearing, the following order was passed:- “No one is in attendance on behalf of the applicant, no intimation is received. Counsel representing the department in the instant Reference Applications are no more appearing on behalf of the applicant department, therefore, direct notice was issued to the applicant, however, no one is appearing on behalf of the applicant. Mr. Ameer Bakhsh Metlo, Advocate present in the Court in some other cases, requests for time to seek instructions in these matters. On his request, adjourned to be fixed after four weeks. In the meanwhile, applicant department is directed to make some alternate arrangement before next date of hearing” Today, again nobody is in attendance. Such conduct reflects that the applicant is not interested in pursuing these matters. Accordingly, these Income Tax Reference Applications are dismissed for non-prosecution along with pending application(s). Office is directed to place copy of this order in connected matter. J U D G E J U D G E Amjad/PA
